   295→      ptyDataBuffer.set(ptyId, [])
   296→    }
   297→    const buffer = ptyDataBuffer.get(ptyId)!
   298→    buffer.push(data)
   299→    // Limit buffer size
   300→    if (buffer.length > 1000) {
   301→      buffer.shift()
   302→    }
   303→    return
   304→  }
   305→
   306→  const message = JSON.stringify({
   307→    type: 'data',
   308→    data
   309→  })
   310→
   311→  streams.forEach(ws => {
   312→    if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   313→      ws.send(message)
   314→    }
   315→  })
   316→}
   317→
   318→export function broadcastPtyExit(
   319→  ptyId: string,
   320→  code: number,
   321→  ptyStreams: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>,
   322→  terminalSubscriptions?: Map<string, Set<WebSocket>>,
   323→  ptyDataBuffer?: Map<string, string[]>
   324→): void {
   325→  const streams = ptyStreams.get(ptyId)
   326→  if (streams && streams.size > 0) {
   327→    const message = JSON.stringify({
   328→      type: 'exit',
   329→      code
   330→    })
   331→
   332→    streams.forEach(ws => {
   333→      if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   334→        ws.send(message)
   335→        ws.close(1000, 'PTY exited')
   336→      }
   337→    })
   338→  }
   339→
   340→  // Clean up stale subscriptions and buffered data for this PTY
   341→  ptyStreams.delete(ptyId)
   342→  terminalSubscriptions?.delete(ptyId)
   343→  ptyDataBuffer?.delete(ptyId)
   344→}

   351→            this.start().then(resolve).catch(reject)

   354→            reject(err)
   355→          }
   356→        })
   357→      })

   360→      throw error
   361→    }
   362→  }
   363→

   365→    stopNonceCleanup()
   366→
   367→    if (this.rateLimitCleanupInterval) {
   368→      clearInterval(this.rateLimitCleanupInterval)
   369→      this.rateLimitCleanupInterval = null
   370→    }
   371→
   372→    if (this.wss) {
   373→      this.wss.close()
   374→      this.wss = null
   375→    }
   376→    if (this.server) {
   377→      this.server.close()
   378→      this.server = null
   379→    }
   380→    log('Stopped')
   381→  }

   384→    return this.server !== null && this.server.listening
